channel.title: Photos on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Photos on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: Not good...
item.description:
Comments

Comment by amritpal singh on 2008-07-30 08:54:21 +0530

lolz, if I am not mistaken this is paan

I was in Babina (a small army cantt station near Jhansi in UP)

I couldn’t believe everyone chews this Paan thing, all the roads, the buses are red.

its not only the street hawker who chews the paan, even the educated, teachers, professionals are addicted to it

that was so irritating
